bullet_points: Remove irrelevant columns (surface_energy, work_function, A_period, B_period, theoretical).
Set material_id as the index.
Apply log-transformation to volume and elastic_anisotropy.

Engineer features: abs_tau_diff = abs(tau - 1.0), radius_diff = A_radius - B_radius, en_diff = abs(B_en - A_en), en_var = variance of electronegativities (A and B), and VEC = A_valence + B_valence + 6 (for O3).
Drop radius_ratio to reduce multicollinearity.
One-hot encode or label-encode categorical columns (crystal_system, magnetic_ordering, A_site, B_site).
Print summary of final feature matrix shape and null counts.
Save the cleaned dataset to a CSV file.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Clean the dataset, handle missing values, and engineer new features for modeling.

bullet_points: Define binary target is_stable based on energy_above_hull == 0.
Use only compositional and structural descriptors as features (exclude all DFT-derived targets).
Train a Gradient Boosted Classifier using stratified 5-fold cross-validation.
Generate and save a combined plot showing the ROC curve and top-20 feature importances.
Save model predictions and performance metrics.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Train a classifier to predict thermodynamic stability.

bullet_points: Define "Mechanically Viable" class using 1st to 99th percentile clipping of the 215-sample elastic subset.
Print percentile thresholds and class distribution.
Address class imbalance using SMOTE or class-weight balancing.
Train a binary classifier (Gradient Boosted trees) using compositional/structural features only.
Evaluate using AUC-ROC and Precision-Recall AUC.
Save a combined plot showing ROC curve, PR curve, and confusion matrix.
Save model predictions.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Train a classifier to identify mechanically viable perovskites.

bullet_points: Train a classifier for is_metal.
Train a regressor for band_gap on the non-metallic subset (evaluate with MAE and R²).
Define "Ductile" vs. "Brittle" using Pugh ratio threshold (G/K < 0.571).
Print class distributions.
Generate a combined figure with subplots: (a) PR curve for is_metal, (b) predicted vs. actual band_gap scatter, (c) confusion matrix for ductility.
Save model predictions.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Predict electronic and mechanical ductility properties.

bullet_points: Define Pareto dominance (strictly better in one objective, not worse in others) using predicted probabilities.
Apply to the full 1283-compound set.
Calculate Mahalanobis distance relative to training set; flag candidates > 97.5th percentile as high-novelty.
Generate 3D scatter plot of Pareto frontier (colored by chemical system) and 2D projection.
Save final ranked candidate table as CSV.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Identify high-performance candidates and perform novelty analysis.

bullet_points: Structure report by pipeline stage (preprocessing, stability, mechanical, electronic, Pareto).
Reference all saved plot filenames and quantitative metrics (AUC-ROC, PR-AUC, MAE, R², confusion matrix).
Discuss limitations: small elastic training set (215 samples) and implications for the 1068 uncharacterized materials.
Include a table summarizing the top-10 Pareto-optimal candidates (ID, formula, probability scores).
sub_tasks.sub_task: Synthesize findings and write the final report.
